zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gallop於1503年出生在英國多瑟特諾斯 包武德時，他的父親John Gallop38歲，母親Joan Collins24歲。他於1550年與Agneta Watkins在英國多瑟特斯托克 阿博特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1610年4月7日在他的家鄉享年107歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gallop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gallup
meanings: English (Sussex): nickname possibly from Middle English galop (Old French galop) ‘gallop’ (the fastest pace of a horse) and given to one who habitually rode at speed, either through temperament or by occupation as a messenger. The surname itself has not been found before the 16th century, so it may be a shortened form of Galpin (earlier Galopin), which has a very similar post-medieval distribution and original sense. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gallop was born in 1503, in North Bowood, Dorset, England, his father, John Gallop, was 38 and his mother, Joan Collins, was 24. He married Agneta Watkins in 1550, in Stoke Abbott, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 April 1610, in his hometown, at the age of 107.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gallop est né en 1503, à North Bowood, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Gallop, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Collins, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agneta Watkins en 1550, à Stoke Abbott, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1610, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 107 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gallopが1503年にイギリスドールセトノース ボウッドで生まれた時，父John Gallopは38歳，母Joan Collinsは24歳であった。1550年にイギリスドールセトストク アボットでAgneta Watkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1610年4月7日に故郷で107歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gallop(이)가 1503년 영국 도르세트 노르스 보우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gallop(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Collins(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1550년 영국 도르세트 스토크 애벗에서 Agneta Watkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 4월 7일 그의 고향에서 107세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gallop nasceu em 1503, em North Bowood, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gallop, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Collins, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agneta Watkins em 1550, em Stoke Abbott, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1610, em sua cidade natal, com 107 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gallop родился в 1503 г. в местности норт боууд, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Gallop было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Collins, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agneta Watkins в 1550 г. в местности сток эбботт, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 апреля 1610 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 107 лет.
